summary: Over 780 guests rate STORIA an average of 4.5 stars. The Neapolitan stone-oven pizza, homemade pasta, and fresh seafood dishes receive particular praise. Many regulars highlight the stylish ambiance with warm lighting and Italian music. Service is consistently described as warm, attentive, and professional – even for larger groups. The central location near Königsplatz makes it a popular meeting point in Munich’s Maxvorstadt district. The house-recipe tiramisù and the wine selection are frequently mentioned as standout highlights.

reviews.text: I can´t understand any negative comment about this brilliant restaurant. I had an excellent experience: the restaurant (in a brand new building) is very nicely decorated (this restaurant could be also in London or New York). Very tasteful, modern/clean but with a cozy touch which creates a lovely atmosphere. The service was very friendly and fast, I had the menu on my table the moment I sat down and all orders arrived promptly. Most importantly the food was absolutely delicious! I do travel a lot and therefor I have seen a lot of different restaurants and it has been a while that I got served such great authentic Italian cuisine. The HOMEMADE pasta with truffle was incredible, as well as the pizza bread and the dessert. The food was also very well presented. Fantastic value for money. I can just recommend this restaurant to everyone who wants to enjoy a well cooked Italian lunch or dinner. Also the location is great since it is just few minutes away from the main train station and the most popular night clubs and bars of Munich. It is the perfect place to kick off a great night with friends in Munich!

this Friday night, we made a reservation at Storia restaurant. I would like to remind everyone that it is better to make a reservation in advance, especially on weekends. This time we ordered the beef Tata, sea bass, Ribeye steak, and I also ordered a glass of Spritz cocktail with lemon flavor, although I recommend the orange flavor instead. For dessert, we had a hot chocolate cake and vanilla ice cream. I strongly advise against trying their steak, but their pasta, fish, and appetizers are definitely worth trying. The location of the restaurant is good, the atmosphere is very nice, and there is no mobile phone signal, and the restaurant does not have WiFi. There are many choices of drinks, suitable for relaxing on weekends, with family or for a date. We had to wait for more than half an hour for the dessert, which I think the waiter forgot about, and by the time it arrived, the ice cream had almost melted. Overall, it is a good Italian restaurant near Munich Central Station.

Very welcoming and stylish restaurant with a nice Bistro flair. The service is first rate, and staff is friendly and very well trained. Prices are a little on the higher side but considering the quality of the food, justified. Carpaccio al Tartufo was light, with just the right amount of truffles to not overwhelm the balance of the beef, olive oil and cheese. Pizza Napoletana was one of the best pizzas i ever had. Very thin dough with a light yet crispy crust. Very generous toppings and a beautiful balance of Umami from the Anchovis, Sweetness of the tomatoes with a generous amount of mozzarella and spices. If anything i would love to try this pizza with buffalo mozzarella. The authentic freshly made Tiramisu was a perfect ending for a great meal. If you are in the area give this restaurant a try, you will not be disappointed.

My colleague asked me if I would want pizza for lunch and he told me it was good. Haven’t tasted good Italian Pizza for quite some time and it was really a good idea. Pizza perfectly-made and tasted really, really great. My choice was a vegetarian pizza and the taste was fully justified and I have no words to say but Mi place tanto! I’ve heard other options were also great-tasting. We’ll try the other variants soon! Cheers and keep up the good Italian taste. 👍 Vegetarian options I tend to go for vegeterian or vegan options but I'm not one. I just want to have a feel of how my vege or vegan friends taste. Pizza's here have a variety of options and the first one I got really satisfied.

The food was fantastic. It's very authentic Italian cuisine. Everything my wife and I ordered was great. The gnocchi with mushrooms were my favourite! The atmosphere was perfect and the music was just right. The prices were fair given the quality of food. My only complaint was my server. She was awful and never checked on us. We had to ask other servers for more wine, never asked about the food, didn't offer coffe or dessert. After 35 minutes of waiting i had to ask another server for the bill. The rest of the staff were top notch, we just got the bad one. The place would be a 5 star had it not been for our airhead server. Highly recommended!

We had a lovely time, the food was great, perfectly cooked and on time. But what made it a perfect experience was our waiter, Thomas. We were a large group who needed to pay on separate bills and he handled that very well, being charming and full of energy the entire evening. He was very attentive but without being intrusive. The fish soup was delicious, unexpectedly full of seafood, making it just as consistent as a main course. The fowl in the menu was a very delicious surprise and the pizza crust was perfect. The perfect dining experience!!!

Choose this place for dinner because very near to our hotel but they didn’t disappoint us. Staff was very welcoming and restaurant is stylish. Attentive water and the service is great. Indoor and outdoor seating. Very beautiful & romantic atmosphere on top of that it was sunset time. Prices are little up on the higher side but considering the quality of the food, justified. The authentic Italian food freshly cooked and it’s delicious. If you are in the area and not worried about prices then I recommend give this restaurant a try.

✨ We celebrated a birthday here and had only the best impressions! 🎉 Our table was reserved and beautifully decorated, and the birthday person received a surprise dessert, which was a very sweet and touching gesture. The food was delicious, beautifully served, and the staff were polite and helpful in choosing both meals and drinks. The atmosphere was cozy and warm, and the location is very convenient. Thank you for a wonderful evening – we’ll definitely come back! ❤️

This centrally located restaurant offers a lovely atmosphere with a warm and inviting ambiance. The service was attentive, professional, and made the dining experience enjoyable. While the prices are on the higher side, the quality of the food justified the cost, delivering well-prepared and flavorful dishes. A great choice for a special night out or a refined dining experience

I love this place, come here often. They are very laid back, so if you want something and need to be out of there in under two hours, you need to get their attention. If you are not in a time crunch, slow service is perfect if you like who you went there with! The food is always amazing, the cocktails are always on point and refreshing and excellent selection of wine.

This was a very intimate setting. The restaurant delivers an upperclass vibe with the design, staff uniforms and tunes. We ordered the parmigiana, a pizza and a couple of drinks with the total around $65 aud. The food was very tasty and the staff were very welcoming. I would recommend to someone in Munich looking for an Italian dish with family or on a date.

I went to Storia with my wife and two kids and we really enjoyed it there ! I was surprised how such a restaurant can create such a good Italian atmosphere even though it is in Germany. The waiters were extremely friendly, especially to my children and the kitchen was very flexible with their needs regarding food portions. Highly recommended !

Årets oppdagelse for oss i München. Nydelig mat og svært hyggelig service. En liten kommunikasjons tabbe mellom kjøkken og servitør, gjorde at vi ventet litt lenge på forretten. Det ble rettet opp med en gratis gave av en strålende god dessert som plaster på såret

I recently moved to München from Italy and was looking for the Italian atmosphere and good food I am used to in itlay. Luckily I found Storia, the best place I've ever been so far ! The pizza, pasta and hot of other dishes are just perfect ! Immer gerne wieder :)

We were in Munich for the day and stumbled upon this reatuarant. We had a wonderful lunch. They were very accommodating with my daughters gluten allergy. Service was exceptional. Thank you Tom for making our visit memorable. Pizza was beyond delicious

The food was very, very good. Atmosphere not as nice with music randomly changing volume to very high. The waiter was rude, making jokes about how we probably want more food based on how we look. Seemed much nicer to the single ladies at next table!

Very nice restaurant with very kind staffs. I ordered pizza and I liked the taste, but the service is kind of slow. If you aren't so hungry you will have some time to chat to your friends in the table. I recommend this place for a good dinner.

I live close by and tried everything so far... pasta, pizza, salads, deserts... all seriously very good. Also very nice atmosphere both indoors and outdoors. It is absolutely a mystery to me why this restaurant does not have a better rating.

Near the city center is this fine dine Italian place. When you pass by you can small the heavenly food at times. Great pizzas and pasta. They also have a great collection of beer, wine and champagne. Best place for Oktoberfest afterparty 😀

The mortadella and buratta pizza was one of the top 3 pizzas I’ve ever had. Staff were lovely and welcoming and happy to help me in English once I butchered some German speaking. Lovely spot to people watch and let the afternoon pass by.

Genuinely one of the best pizzas I’ve had - we ordered the salami picante. Great service and a cool restaurant! They also squeezed us in even though they could have refused us as we arrived so late, lovely accommodating people!

Storia Restaurant is my saving grace on stressful days. The option to order food contactlessly is super practical. The Italian specialties are a culinary delight. The friendly service rounds off the overall picture perfectly

Came across Storia today. Absolutely recommend. Nice atmosphere. Maybe I was just lucky, but oh my god, the chestnut pasta with broccoli was amazing. My partner also loved his pizza. All in all, a very good experience.

No english menu to understand more.. but luckily have a staff that can speak and understand simple english… pasta is nice tasty but bread is more towards hard to bite and chew… overall acceptable lunch
I experienced Storia for both, buiness dinner and dinner with friends. The food is great and so is the service (thanks again Thomas for making our dinner cozier). An italian experience in Munich.
Storia is an oasis within a busy commercial part of Munich with inside and patio seating. They offer authentic Italian cuisine with plenty. Of vegetarian options and a large wine selection.
We ordered Pizza last night and it was pure awesomeness. The dough wasn’t soggy and tasted amazing. Fresh basil on top! Fanstatico! That Pizzaiolo really knows his business. Soon again
really nice place for lunch. One of their waitress (Fiona) is really friendly and helpful to help you choose. if you are going there for lunch take a menu including the apertizer.
Great, tasty food - we really appreciated the service and some touches like the fleece blankets on every chair outside in case you're cold! Definitely would go again!
The Location Storia is my go-to place for Italian food. The pizza is the best I've had in a long way, and the staff is always so friendly and welcoming
Solid pizza (though not cheap and not really Neopolitan as some reviewers have described) and very friendly service from the handsome waiter!
An excellent restaurant, very kind and professional waiters and great dishes + coffee! The best restaurant we've been to in Munich.
A bit pricy, nice to sit outside, cool solid wooden tables. Tasty food. Olive oil at the table in homeopathic small bottles.
Delicious fairly priced lunch menu. I strongly recommend their menu 1 with the antipasti. I will be back.
The Pizza and salad was amazing. They split is so we could share. Amazing place for an afternoon lunch.
Great pizza in a very nice location. looks quite fancy but prices are reasonable (pizza 8 - 13€)
We had a beautiful dinner. Francesco was wonderful and the service was amazing. Excellent food!
Perfect choice for lunch during working hours. Good prices and very nice pizza and pasta.
Really nice Ambiente,very attentive service! The selection of appetizers was amazing!
Best pizza in the city! Great quality food and amazing people working in this place.
Very good Italian food! Nice place and good (friendly) service! We will come back !
Very nice Italian restaurant. Food is excellent and it has substantial wine list.
Absolutely delicious gnocchi and steak, and prices were totally reasonable!
Whenever I feel like having some fancy Italian food, this is where I go.
Very nice atmosphere, food was delicious. Luigi was a kind and helpful!
Excellent pizza, really good service and very nice house white, a+
Great Food, Great atmosphere and gentle waiters!! Place to be!
Good place for business lunch or a nice dinner in the evening
Nice restaurant, quite democratic prices for such a place.
The pizza and pasta was great and prices were reasonable
